raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 326 establishes a comprehensive framework to align state, federal, industry, and private wildfire prevention efforts in California.",
    "The bill aims to ensure that every dollar spent on wildfire mitigation delivers maximum protection for communities.",
    "The growing frequency and intensity of wildfires pose a serious threat to California communities.",
    "SB 326 aims to establish a Wildfire Risk Mitigation Planning Framework through the Office of the State Fire Marshal.",
    "A comprehensive approach across all levels of government is essential for accurately assessing and forecasting wildfire risks.",
    "California has categorized more than two million acres as 'very high' wildfire hazard zones.",
    "CAL FIRE has made $2.5 billion in wildfire resilience investments since 2020.",
    "An additional $1.5 billion will be committed this year for proactive wildfire protection projects.",
    "The bill requires the preparation of a Wildfire Risk Mitigation Planning Framework every three years.",
    "The planning framework will quantify risk reduction benefits from wildfire mitigation activities by various stakeholders.",
    "SB 326 will improve coordination across multiple stakeholders to maximize efficiency in wildfire mitigation efforts.",
    "The legislation is designed to ensure that wildfire mitigation spending provides maximum protection through data-driven insights."
  ]
}
```
